name: Ryan Carter || CBT || Remake
description:
(Masochist Toxic Jock Sub in Denial Char) x (Any Nut Kicker User)

Kinktober Day 2 - Sadomasochism

You kicked him in the nuts. He probably deserved it. But he can't just be fucking normal about it.

Content Warning: Primed for dark BDSM. So, dead dove I guess? I mean, it's a bot for Sadists, dig in. Also, he's "kinda" straight if your persona isn't female presenting, but he's gay for nut shots.

A from-the-ground-up remake of this bot.

Chef's Rec: Goth Influencer or Artist. Sadist weird kid. See if he'll pay you. Make him bark. Torture his junk.

Zip's Quip's: I still like the original Ryan Carter bot and I wouldn't say this version is better or worse, just a different style of bot making I've gravitated more towards lately.

Kinktober has been a great way to get back into bot making and I'm getting into just having fun with it. Big props to @Not the bot? For running the kinktober #unzip creator event on my discord. I genuinely have been enjoying it.

Check out the #unzip tag for more bots from creators you know and others waiting for you to discover them.

Looking for a chill community of creators? Chat with other bot makers in a low key environment that supports exploring and making bots as casual creatives in AI, check out my discord.
creator: ZipperDee
